text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer, can we talk?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: What is it? Unless it's urgent, I'd rather you rest after such a big race.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: What is it? Unless it's urgent, I'd rather you rest after such a big race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say it's urgent, but there is something I wanted to say as
soon as possible.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I realized something after today's race. I don't think I've ever actually
thanked you.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Thanked me? For what?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Even though I was on a different team, you still approached me like I
was one of your trainees.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And when I asked to move to your team, you accepted my request
without a single complaint.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
That's nothing special... In fact, I was worried I might be
overstepping.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
After joining Team Sirius and getting to know my new teammates, I
can tell what sort of person you are.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You wholeheartedly believe in us all and do everything you can to
support us.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to give you a proper thank-you, but... could you
wait just a little longer?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You really don't need to...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: No, I want to show my gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: And I'll do it by running with you towards that beautiful scenery.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she speaks, Silence Suzuka's expression is soft and filled with the
same joy she has while running.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Well, if it's a thank-you like that, I suppose I can accept it.
choice_data_list:
We'd better keep our eyes on the scenery
ahead!

We'd better keep our eyes on the scenery
ahead!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's finally snatched her first victory as a member of Team Sirius.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her skills and heart soar upward, I can't help but wonder what sort
of views she'll show me in the future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whatever they look like, I'm sure they'll be joyous and fantastical.
